name: tacet
description: Realtime captions for any audio on your machine. Online (Deepgram) or fully offline (Nemotron Speech Streaming 0.6B).
author: Arun Kashyap

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/audio-worklet.js && node --check public/settings.js && node --check public/onboarding.js && node --check public/history.js && node --check public/ui-helpers.js && node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.cjs && node --check transcribers/deepgram.js && node --check transcribers/offline-nemotron.js && node --check models/manager.js && node --check models/registry.js && node --check sessions/store.js && node --check scripts/run-server.js && node --check scripts/native-env.js
